notes: isHydratedRef pattern correctly prevents repeated dispatch when storedCollapsed updates from setStoredCollapsed.
collapsedRef captures latest state for the stable useMemo closure (deps: [setStoredCollapsed]).
toggleLeftPane dispatches SET_LEFT_PANE_COLLAPSED with the explicit next value and calls setStoredCollapsed(next), keeping reducer state and localStorage in sync without race conditions.
TOGGLE_LEFT_PANE action is defined in the reducer but never dispatched (dead code). Kept for forward compatibility / external dispatchers; removal would be a public-API change. Accepted as-is.
useEffect dep array [storedCollapsed] is correct; dispatch is stable so it does not need to be listed.
Optional leftPaneCollapsed/onToggleLeftPane preserve backward compatibility (default expanded).
useMemo dependencies for leftPaneStyle/rightPaneStyle correctly include both leftWidth and leftPaneCollapsed.
Expand bar fixed width (24px) and right pane width calc(100% - 24px) are arithmetically consistent.
Accessibility attributes (aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-hidden, aria-label) are present on the collapse/expand controls.
transition-[width] duration-200 provides smooth UX without overcomplicating layout.
Collapse button is rendered only when onCollapse is provided (sound conditional).
ml-auto pushes the collapse button to the right edge — idiomatic Tailwind.
ARIA attributes (aria-expanded='true', aria-controls='worktree-left-pane', aria-label) match the expand button on WorktreeDesktopLayout.
Props are wired correctly: leftPaneCollapsed flows from state.layout.leftPaneCollapsed; onToggleLeftPane forwards actions.toggleLeftPane.
leftPaneMemo dependency array includes actions.toggleLeftPane (memoization is correct).
actions.toggleLeftPane is stable across renders (useMemo with [setStoredCollapsed]; setStoredCollapsed is itself useCallback-stable inside useLocalStorageState).
LayoutState.leftPaneCollapsed: boolean is properly added with JSDoc explaining persistence and the localStorage key.
WorktreeUIAction union has both TOGGLE_LEFT_PANE and SET_LEFT_PANE_COLLAPSED — discriminated union is exhaustive.
initialLayoutState.leftPaneCollapsed: false is consistent with the default.

checks_performed.comment_quality: comments explain WHY (e.g., why isHydratedRef pattern is needed, why memoization deps are listed) — no WHAT-level noise
checks_performed.hydration_safety: useState initializers in WorktreeDetailRefactored guard window access with try/catch and typeof window checks; useLocalStorageState seeds with defaultValue then syncs on mount
checks_performed.backward_compatibility: WorktreeDesktopLayout's leftPaneCollapsed/onToggleLeftPane are optional — existing callers pass nothing and get the prior behavior

notes: Implementation already adheres to SOLID/KISS/DRY/YAGNI. No code changes were necessary. All quality gates pass: TypeScript (no errors), ESLint (no warnings/errors), unit tests (340 files / 6416 passing / 7 skipped). The localStorage synchronization pattern using isHydratedRef + collapsedRef + dispatching SET_LEFT_PANE_COLLAPSED with an explicit next value is the correct approach and avoids any infinite-loop risk. Backward compatibility for WorktreeDesktopLayout is preserved through optional props with safe defaults.
